internal.content:
---
title: Adding new window size rules
---

OOTB rules are stored in `packages/window-size-tool/rules.json`.

See the [window-size-tool overview](../overview#window-size-tool) for details on how the rules are authored.

---
title: Adding new window size rules
---

OOTB rules are stored in `packages/window-size-tool/rules.json`.

See the [window-size-tool overview](../overview#window-size-tool) for details on how the rules are authored.
